column.text:
• Toronto Blue Jays designated right-handed pitcher Yariel Rodriguez for assignment.
• Los Angeles Angels transferred third baseman Yoan Moncada to the 60-day injured list due to right knee inflammation.
• Seattle Mariners placed shortstop J.P. Crawford on the 10-day injured list with a right hand contusion.
• Los Angeles Angels placed second baseman Vaughn Grissom on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Baltimore Orioles placed right-handed pitcher Chris Bassitt on the 15-day injured list with low back discomfort.
• Oakland Athletics activated third baseman Max Muncy from the 10-day injured list.
• Arizona Diamondbacks sent left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr. on a rehab assignment to the ACL D-backs.
• Toronto Blue Jays activated right-handed pitcher Tommy Nance from the 15-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
